hooks.command: d=/Users/cotopaxilyon/WebstormProjects/Isobar/docs/qa-fail; t=$(grep -l 'status: *pending-review' "$d"/*.md 2>/dev/null | grep -v /README.md | xargs -n1 basename 2>/dev/null | sed 's/\.md$//' | paste -sd, -); if [ -n "$t" ]; then jq -cn --arg t "$t" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"UserPromptSubmit",additionalContext:("⚠ Unreviewed QA Fail plans: " + $t + " — see docs/qa-fail/")}}'; fi; exit 0
